mapper.sql: pr.id AS pr_id, pr.diagnosis AS pr_diagnosis, pr.instructions AS pr_instructions, pr.follow_up AS pr_follow_up, pr.created_at AS pr_created_at, pr.updated_at AS pr_updated_at, p.id AS p_id, pu.id AS pu_id, pu.name AS pu_name, pu.mobile_number AS pu_mobile_number, pu.email AS pu_email, pu.role AS pu_role, pu.is_active AS pu_is_active, pu.created_at AS pu_created_at, pu.updated_at AS pu_updated_at, d.id AS d_id, du.id AS du_id, du.name AS du_name, du.mobile_number AS du_mobile_number, du.email AS du_email, du.role AS du_role, du.is_active AS du_is_active, du.created_at AS du_created_at, du.updated_at AS du_updated_at, a.id AS a_id, a.code AS a_code, a.appointment_date AS a_appointment_date, a.start_time AS a_start_time, a.end_time AS a_end_time, a.status AS a_status, pi.id AS pi_id, pi.medicine_name AS pi_medicine_name, pi.dosage AS pi_dosage, pi.frequency AS pi_frequency, pi.duration AS pi_duration, pi.notes AS pi_notes

FROM prescriptions pr JOIN patients p ON p.id = pr.patient_id JOIN users pu ON pu.id = p.user_id JOIN doctors d ON d.id = pr.doctor_id JOIN users du ON du.id = d.user_id LEFT JOIN appointments a ON a.id = pr.appointment_id LEFT JOIN prescription_items pi ON pi.prescription_id = pr.id
mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC, pi.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prescriptions ( patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_id, diagnosis, instructions, follow_up, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{patient.id}, #{doctor.id}, #{appointment.id}, #{diagnosis}, #{instructions}, #{followUp}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE prescriptions SET patient_id = #{patient.id}, doctor_id = #{doctor.id}, appointment_id = #{appointment.id}, diagnosis = #{diagnosis}, instructions = #{instructions}, follow_up = #{followUp}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prescription_items ( prescription_id, medicine_name, dosage, frequency, duration, notes ) VALUES ( #{prescriptionId}, #{item.medicineName}, #{item.dosage}, #{item.frequency}, #{item.duration}, #{item.notes} )
